message:
feat(core,parser): add capability matrix automation, BLESS mode, and security hardening

Test Infrastructure (fm-core):
- Add BLESS mode to capability matrix and README tests for auto-updating
  generated content: set BLESS=1 to regenerate checked-in artifacts
  instead of failing on drift
- Add budget_broker_rebalances_after_parse_and_tracks_exhaustion test
  verifying parse/layout/render allocation logic under pressure
- Enhanced readme_runtime_capability_metadata_block test with auto-
  creation and update logic

Parser Security (fm-parser):
- Harden is_safe_click_target() with whitespace trimming, explicit
  scheme checking (http/https/mailto only), and relative path support
- Prevents injection via crafted click handler URLs

CLI/WASM Cleanup:
- Reorder source loading before budget initialization in render/validate
  commands to avoid spurious pressure reads on empty state
- Code cleanup: variable ordering, guard placement, formatting in WASM

Evidence:
- Update capability_matrix.json: reclassify sankey and xyChart from
  unsupported to partial status
- Add generated runtime capability metadata table to README.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
